title: Restore Version 53 stable base — all core features working

requirements.text: Restore the backend (backend/main.mo) to the Version 53 state, which includes fully functional data types and actor methods for Products, Retailers, Listings, Orders, user registration/approval workflows, and role-based approval for Shoppers, Drivers, and Pick-up Points. All stub/removed backend modules must be re-implemented so they return real data rather than errors or empty arrays.

quotes: version 53. evrything was fine i just needed to get orders workflow working, users could register and get approved all backend modules were connected. i had products retailers and listings i could manage all these and approve shoppers drivers and pick up points

acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor exposes working createProduct, updateProduct, getProducts methods that persist and return real data
Backend actor exposes working createRetailer, updateRetailer, getRetailers methods that persist and return real data
Backend actor exposes working createListing, updateListing, getListings methods that persist and return real data
Backend actor exposes working user registration and approval methods (requestApproval, approveUser, rejectUser)
Backend actor exposes working shopper, driver, and pick-up point application and approval methods
All previously stubbed hooks no longer throw errors — they connect to real backend methods

requirements.text: Restore all frontend hooks (useProducts, useRetailers, useListings, useRoleApplications, useShopperApplication, useDriverApplication, usePickupPointApplication, useCategories, useTowns, useSystemSettings) to their Version 53 implementations that call real backend actor methods instead of returning stubs, empty arrays, or throwing errors.

quotes: on this version 56 everything is not working

acceptanceCriteria: useProducts returns real product data from the backend
useRetailers returns real retailer data from the backend
useListings returns real listing data from the backend
useRoleApplications, useShopperApplication, useDriverApplication, usePickupPointApplication all correctly submit and retrieve applications from the backend
No hook file contains a stub that unconditionally throws an error or returns an empty array for operations that have backend support

requirements.text: Restore all admin pages (AdminProductsPage, AdminRetailersPage, AdminManageListingsPage, AdminShoppersPage, AdminDriversPage, AdminPickupPointsPage, AdminOrdersPage) to their Version 53 implementations that display and manage real backend data, removing all 'backend-unavailable' alert banners and stub empty states.

quotes: i had products retailers and listings i could manage all these and approve shoppers drivers and pick up points

acceptanceCriteria: AdminProductsPage lists, creates, and edits products from the backend
AdminRetailersPage lists, creates, and edits retailers from the backend
AdminManageListingsPage lists, creates, and edits listings from the backend
AdminShoppersPage shows pending/approved/rejected shopper applications with approve/reject actions
AdminDriversPage shows pending/approved/rejected driver applications with approve/reject actions
AdminPickupPointsPage shows pending/approved/rejected pickup point applications with approve/reject actions
No 'backend unavailable' alert banners appear on any admin page

requirements.text: Restore all admin dialog components (ProductEditDialog, RetailerEditDialog, ListingEditDialog) to their Version 53 implementations that provide real create/edit forms connected to backend mutations, replacing the current stub alerts.

quotes: i had products retailers and listings i could manage all these

acceptanceCriteria: ProductEditDialog renders a form with fields for product name, category, price, description, and image upload
RetailerEditDialog renders a form with fields for retailer name, location, operating hours, and contact details
ListingEditDialog renders a form with fields for linking a product to a retailer with pricing and availability
All dialogs submit data to the backend and show success/error feedback

requirements.text: Restore the CataloguePage, ProductDetailPage, RetailerListPage, and RetailerCatalogPage to their Version 53 implementations that fetch and display real catalogue, product, and retailer data from the backend, removing the unavailability alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: CataloguePage fetches and displays products with working search and category filter
ProductDetailPage fetches and displays product details by ID
RetailerListPage shows retailers for a given province/town
RetailerCatalogPage shows a retailer's product listings
No page displays a 'catalogue unavailable' or 'backend unavailable' alert for features that have backend support

requirements.text: Restore the AdminOnly guard component to its Version 53 implementation that actually renders its children when the caller is an admin, removing the current stub that always shows a 'not yet implemented' alert.
acceptanceCriteria: AdminOnly component renders its children for authenticated admin users
AdminOnly component shows an access-denied message for non-admin users
The admin dashboard and all admin sub-pages are accessible to admin users

constraints: Do not add the Orders workflow in this build — it will be added separately on top of the restored V53 base
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Orders workflow implementation (deferred to next build)
Any new features beyond restoring V53 functionality
Changes to the design system, color tokens, or visual theme
